# Megaphone

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Megaphone;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Megaphone { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
advertisement, announcement, attention, alert, loudspeaker, megaphone, notification

## Categories
multimedia, notifications

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/megaphone)
